overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character walking through an indoor commercial corridor and lobby, interacting with an NPC demonstrating a weapon, then exiting into a bright futuristic urban plaza with parking structures and elevated walkways. The clip transitions from neon-lit interior spaces to sunlit outdoor cyberpunk city architecture.

events.description: woman raises handgun equipped with holographic sight attachment
camera passes close to the woman, temporarily blocking the view

fluorescent tube lights along the ceiling

metal chain link fencing along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow indoor corridor with teal carpet and graffiti-covered walls. A woman with dreadlocks stands prominently in the path, demonstrating a futuristic handgun with a holographic sight attachment. The lighting is artificial with a distinct cyan-teal color cast typical of cyberpunk aesthetics.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial lobby with payment counter and seating area

events.description: exiting narrow corridor into open lobby area with seating and service counter
dialogue options appear near PAY HERE counter indicating possible interaction

agents.ego_description: walking through lobby past red seating area toward a payment counter with neon signage

notable_agents.action: person sitting on red couch near the large advertisement poster

entered.detail: large wall poster featuring a muscular man with text NEW LOOK GOLDEN ROME
long red leather sofa with magazines on it
service counter with glowing teal PAY HERE neon signage
red and blue neon OPEN sign above the counter window
glass window with metal bars and a vendor visible inside

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a commercial lobby featuring a prominent red leather couch and a large AVANTE fashion advertisement. The player approaches a payment counter illuminated by neon OPEN and PAY HERE signs. The space has a retro-futuristic aesthetic with warm lighting contrasting the previous corridor's teal tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: building exit vestibule with glass doors leading to plaza

events.description: approaching glass doors causes dramatic shift from artificial to bright natural sunlight
exiting building through glass doors into outdoor urban environment

agents.ego_description: walking through glass exit doors transitioning from indoor to outdoor space

entered.detail: large glass doors with metal frames leading outside
illuminated poster for Classique Libre showing a figure in white
bright outdoor plaza with buildings visible through the glass

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a transition space with glass exit doors, passing a clothing advertisement poster. Bright sunlight streams through the doors, creating a stark contrast with the dim interior. The camera approaches and exits into a sunlit urban plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with multi-story parking and commercial buildings

events.description: fully exiting building into bright open plaza with parking structures
turning right to follow sidewalk along the plaza edge

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk in a futuristic urban plaza with colorful parking garages and billboards

notable_agents.action: person with red hair sitting on the curb near concrete bollards

entered.detail: colorful multi-level parking garage with yellow and red floor markings
building with large red advertisement billboard featuring a face
tall palm trees scattered throughout the plaza area
short concrete posts with yellow stripes lining the sidewalk
concrete ramp leading up to an elevated pedestrian walkway

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into a bright sunlit urban plaza surrounded by futuristic architecture. A colorful multi-story parking structure dominates the left side while palm trees and concrete bollards line the pedestrian walkway. The scene features harsh midday shadows and a cyberpunk city aesthetic with large commercial billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway with futuristic skyscrapers

events.description: entering covered area beneath building overpass with dramatic shadow contrast
ascending ramp underneath the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking under building overpasses and ascending a ramp, moving through shadows toward brighter areas with skyscrapers ahead

notable_agents.action: person walking up the ramp ahead of the player

entered.detail: massive concrete pillars and beams of the elevated highway or building
sloped concrete walkway with metal railings leading upward
tall angular building with unique architecture and construction cranes visible
silver metal handrails along the edge of the ramp

segments.scene_description: The player walks beneath a massive concrete overpass structure, entering a shadowed area with dramatic contrast between dark shelter and bright sky beyond. The path ascends a ramp with metal railings toward a futuristic skyscraper visible in the distance. The environment transitions from open plaza to covered urban canyon with industrial concrete architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a moody, neon-lit interior corridor into a sprawling, sun-drenched futuristic city. It begins in a narrow hallway with teal carpets and graffiti-covered walls, where a woman demonstrates a holographic handgun under a cyan artificial glow. As the camera moves forward, the space opens into a commercial lobby where the cool tones shift to warm lighting, passing a red leather couch and neon payment signs. The scene then transitions through glass exit doors as bright sunlight floods the frame, leading the viewer out into a vivid urban plaza characterized by a colorful parking structure and palm trees under a harsh midday sky. Finally, the path leads beneath a massive concrete overpass into deep shadow before ascending a metal ramp toward a distant skyscraper in a dense urban canyon.
